title.zh: 中医美容养颜：内调外养，焕发自然美
title.en: TCM Beauty & Skin Care: Inner Balance, Natural Radiance

description.zh: 从中医角度探讨美容养颜的方法，通过内调气血、外养肌肤，实现自然健康的美
description.en: Explore TCM beauty and skin care methods - balance Qi-Blood internally, nourish skin externally for natural healthy beauty

zh.text: ，认为皮肤的状态反映了身体内部的健康状况。通过调理气血、平衡阴阳，可以从根本上改善皮肤问题，焕发自然健康的美丽。
中医认为，皮肤问题往往与内在脏腑功能失调有关：

items: 面色萎黄：多与气血不足有关
皮肤干燥：多与阴虚津亏有关
痤疮痘痘：多与湿热内蕴有关
皮肤油腻：多与痰湿体质有关
色斑暗沉：多与肝郁气滞有关
皱纹早生：多与肾精不足有关
红枣：补气养血，改善面色
桂圆：补心脾，益气血
黑芝麻：补肝肾，乌发养颜
银耳：滋阴润燥，润泽肌肤
百合：养阴润肺，清心安神
绿豆：清热解毒，消痘痘
苦瓜：清热泻火，改善痤疮
薏米：健脾祛湿，减少油腻
冬瓜：利水消肿，清热祛湿
黄瓜：清热生津，美容养颜

zh.text: 穴位按摩可以促进气血运行，改善面部血液循环，达到美容效果。
位置：面部，瞳孔直下，眶下孔凹陷处。
位置：鼻翼外缘中点旁，鼻唇沟中。
位置：手背，第一、二掌骨之间。
位置：小腿外侧，膝盖下3寸。

items: 每天早晚按摩面部穴位5分钟
用指腹轻轻按压，力度适中
按摩方向从内向外，从下向上
配合护肤产品效果更佳
持之以恒，效果逐渐显现

zh.title: 银耳红枣养颜汤
zh.instructions:
1. 银耳泡发撕成小朵
2. 红枣去核
3. 加水炖煮1小时
4. 加入枸杞、冰糖
5. 每日饮用，养血润肤
6. 长期坚持，改善面色

items: 保证充足睡眠，让肌肤得到休息
保持心情愉悦，避免情绪波动影响气血
适度运动，促进血液循环
避免过度化妆，让肌肤透气
防晒保湿，保护肌肤屏障

zh.text: 温馨提示：中医美容需要长期坚持，效果需要时间积累。如有严重皮肤问题，建议咨询专业医师或皮肤科医生。

en.text: TCM beauty emphasizes 'internal balance, external care', believing skin condition reflects internal health. By regulating Qi-Blood and balancing Yin-Yang, skin issues can be fundamentally improved for natural healthy beauty.
TCM believes skin issues relate to internal organ dysfunction:

items: Sallow complexion: Related to Qi-Blood deficiency
Dry skin: Related to Yin deficiency, fluid depletion
Acne: Related to damp-heat accumulation
Oily skin: Related to phlegm-damp constitution
Dark spots: Related to liver stagnation, Qi stagnation
Early wrinkles: Related to kidney essence deficiency
Red dates: Tonify Qi-Blood, improve complexion
Longan: Tonify heart-spleen, benefit Qi-Blood
Black sesame: Tonify liver-kidney, darken hair, nourish face
Tremella: Nourish Yin, moisten dryness, hydrate skin
Lily bulb: Nourish Yin, moisten lung, calm spirit
Mung beans: Clear heat, resolve toxins, reduce acne
Bitter melon: Clear heat, drain fire, improve acne
Coix seed: Strengthen spleen, resolve dampness, reduce oiliness
Winter melon: Drain water, resolve swelling, clear heat-damp
Cucumber: Clear heat, generate fluids, beautify skin

en.text: Acupoint massage promotes Qi-Blood circulation, improves facial blood flow for beauty effects.
Location: Face, directly below pupil, infraorbital foramen.
Location: Midpoint of outer nose wing, in nasolabial groove.
Location: Hand, between first and second metacarpal bones.
Location: Outer lower leg, 3 cun below knee.

items: Massage facial acupoints 5 minutes morning and evening
Use finger pads, moderate pressure
Massage direction: inward to outward, downward to upward
Combine with skincare products for better effect
Consistency brings gradual results

en.title: Tremella Red Date Beauty Soup
en.instructions:
1. Soak tremella, tear into pieces
2. Remove date seeds
3. Simmer for 1 hour
4. Add goji and sugar
5. Drink daily to nourish blood, moisturize skin
6. Long-term practice improves complexion

items: Ensure sufficient sleep for skin rest
Maintain happy mood, avoid emotional fluctuations affecting Qi-Blood
Moderate exercise promotes blood circulation
Avoid excessive makeup, let skin breathe
Sun protection and moisturizing protect skin barrier

en.text: Note: TCM beauty requires long-term consistency. For severe skin issues, consult a physician or dermatologist.
